movie.title: EXIT (2019) Dual Audio [Hindi ORG & Korean] BluRay 480p, 720p & 1080p | GDrive
movie.synopsis: When an unknown toxic gas strikes Seoul in an unprecedented act of terror, Yong-nam has just met Eui-ju from college by chance at his mother’s birthday banquet. The city falls under sudden noxious gas attack and together, they must escape the panic-stricken city.
